temporal_description:
(00:00-00:05) In a hospital room, Ross stands beside a hospital bed, holding the hand of a woman, Rachel, who is in labor. She is sweating and in pain. He looks down at her with a concerned expression. An IV drip is visible next to the bed. (Storyline: The scene opens on a moment of high emotional stakes, establishing that Rachel is in the final stages of labor and Ross is by her side, providing support.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Rachel's voice is strained and pained. Ross is silent. 2) Background sounds or music: None.)
(00:06-00:11) The camera angle shifts to a low angle, looking up at Rachel as she continues to speak to Ross. She is sweating profusely and appears to be in significant pain, emphasizing the intensity of the moment. (Storyline: Rachel's dialogue reveals that she is counting the number of women who have had children, highlighting her own physical struggle and the gravity of her situation.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Pained, strained, and slightly breathless. 2) Background sounds or music: None.)
